name: Best Practices for Maintainers
description: Making your life easier as an open source maintainer, from documenting processes to leveraging your community.
author: GitHub
abstract: This guide provides essential practices for open source project maintainers to ensure sustainability, manage contributions effectively, and foster a welcoming project environment. Topics include documentation, issue tracking, and communication strategies.
mentions: These guides are available in over 20 languages.
learningObjectives:
After this lesson, the learner should be able to:
- Document processes to reduce repetitive overhead as a maintainer
- Set and communicate expectations with contributors
- Use tools and automation to make maintenance sustainable
- Know when and how to say no to contributions or requests
- Leverage the community to share the maintainer workload
teaches: Implement sustainable processes and community-led workflows to effectively manage an open source project.
